programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: UFOs Over Arizona
programme.desc: Exploring the top 5 most compelling UFO sightings in Arizona.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: Declassified
programme.desc: Declassified documents from the Cold War shine light into the hidden communications between the US and the Soviet Union during the heavy tensions.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: Marilyn Monroe Exposed
programme.desc: Exploring whether the President attempted to disclose information on UFO abductions and close encounters in an unorthodox way.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: UFOs Over Vegas
programme.desc: Seeking to determine if the UFOs seen in Arizona and Nevada are man-made or from other worlds.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: The Golden Record
programme.desc: In the late 1970s, the U.S. government sends a message to our distant neighbors in outer space. Twenty years later, the response we receive sparks the biggest UFO sighting in history.

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Tina's confession on the radio about Teddy's infidelities leaves Erica panicked that her sister is hurting the Mary Mary brand. Tina's mess-up costs Warryn money, and Erica nearly collapses from exhaustion.

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: June's on-camera meltdown derails the magazine competition.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: A shocking arrest. June's family fights to save her life.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: June is missing. A shocking murder triggers a family crisis.

programme.title: Braxton Family Values
programme.desc: Toni, Trina, and Towanda travel to Russia for a concert. The airline loses their luggage. In LA, Tamar pressures Vince to help her with her album but tempers flare when they clash over their opinion of how they should proceed.

programme.title: Braxton Family Values
programme.desc: Vince and the Braxton sisters try to get Toni to agree to record a family album. If Toni won't commit, then neither will Tamar. Towanda moves into Toni's house, and chaos ensues. Gabe wants to buy a house for Trina to help their marriage.

programme.title: Braxton Family Values
programme.desc: The Braxton sisters fly out to Los Angeles to throw their mom a 60th party luau, but Tamar and Traci's nasty squabble threatens to ruin the celebration. Toni decides to go house hunting in Los Angeles and is seriously considering moving there.

programme.title: Braxton Family Values
programme.desc: Tamar tries to dissuade Toni from posing for Playboy, even booking a nude shoot for her. Evelyn goes on a blind date with a white guy, a first for her. Tamar throws an "appreciation" party for Vince to convince him to help her with her solo album.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: Manhunt for June. Mommy wars. Alana's big audition.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: Mama stakeout; Alana's self-doubt threatens runway show.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: Mama and Geno crash into the garage on their return home.

programme.title: Mama June: From Not To Hot
programme.desc: Mama cries out for help. Alana's outburst goes viral.

programme.title: David Tutera Unveiled
programme.desc: David plans a Super 16 bash for Basketball Wife Tami Roman's daughter while planning his baby shower. Tami thinks David can't pull off a hip-hop party, but David has a big surprise: rap artist Da Brat.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro va al hospital, se entera de lo que le pasó a Inés y decide entrar a verla. Cuando está dentro de la habitación, llega Leonardo. Elmer se reúne con quienes atacaron a Jonathan e Inés. Leonardo comienza a recordar.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio interrumpe una reunión para informar que la última inversión de Pedro se triplicó en ganancias. Ignacio le da un computador a Ivonne para que rescaten el disco duro. Elmer le dice a Melquiades que a Jonathan pronto le llegará su hora.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer intenta atacar a Humberto, Pedro evita que le hagan daño. Ignacio le reclama al Chamoy por no terminar el trabajo. Yesenia está de acuerdo con la boda de Inés. Elmer le pregunta al abogado Martín que hizo con el otro bebé.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer amenaza al abogado Martín con hablar sobre su negocio de tráfico de niños, le exige saber dónde está su hijo. Pedro sospecha que el Chamoy fue quien los atacó. Leonardo le pregunta a Sara si hubo algún problema cuando él nació.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le insinúa a Inés que el bebé que perdieron podría no haber muerto. Ella le cuenta a Jonathan lo que pasó durante el parto de los gemelos. Nora y Humberto discuten si deben decirle a Leonardo la verdad sobre su nacimiento.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le dice a Basilio que Humberto esconde algo sobre él y Leonardo, se encuentra con Elmer. El Chamoy amenaza a Ignacio con una pistola y le dice que le dé información sobre Leonardo. Inés le confiesa a Paloma que tiene miedo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le advierte a Ignacio que no le haga daño a Leonardo. Fernanda le dice a Pedro que lo ama, él le contesta que su amor lo hace seguir adelante. Leonardo le exige a Elmer que salga de la vida de su madre y de su hermana.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora le pregunta a Humberto si ya habló con Pedro sobre lo de la adopción. Fernanda logra que Perico firme los documentos que Ignacio le entregó. Elmer llama a Ignacio y le pone la grabación donde él le dice que mate a Armando.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro escucha a Fernanda hablando por teléfono y oye cuando la llaman señorita Blanco. Él recibe una llamada del doctor que operará a Santiago. Ignacio y Elmer tratan de llegar a un acuerdo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le comenta a Fernanda lo que está haciendo por Santiago. Hacen el amor, pero luego ella le dice que tienen que posponer la boda. Ignacio le dice a su madre que no les conviene meter a Elmer a la empresa porque Fernanda lo conoce.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio le lleva unos papeles a Fernanda para que Leonardo los firme, quiere que ella se quede con todas las acciones de Leonardo. Fernanda le dice que ya no quiere destruir a los Fuentemayor, él le pregunta si está enamorada de Pedro.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ivonne le entrega a Ignacio la información de la computadora de Connie, él quiere encontrar la foto de Pedro con otra mujer. Ignacio le dice a su madre que está enamorado de Fernanda. Justino intenta manipular a Tania.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda acepta que está enamorada de Perico. Jonathan y Leonardo son víctimas de una explosión. Ignacio encuentra la foto de Leonardo con otra mujer. Una enfermera llama a Inés y le dice que tiene noticias sobre Jonathan.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Jonathan está en cuidados intensivos, pero Elmer se mete a su habitación para terminar el trabajo. Ignacio llega a la dirección donde fue tomada la foto de Leonardo con una mujer y habla con Trencha. Antes de irse reconoce a Paloma.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On Mark Hill and Izzy Balmer's final day, they fall in love with cuddly toys, dumbwaiters and early 20th century glass. But only one of them can reign victorious after the final auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper pairs up with Hettie Jago, who is new to the Trip. Starting off in Perth, Hettie spots a pair of fish jugs, while David tries to compete with a beaded tapestry featuring man's best friend.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Hettie Jago visit Glasgow, then travel south through the Scottish Borders. Along the way, they scoop up an enamel necklace, vintage pens, a dusty pair of Victorian portraits and more.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Cumbria, Hettie Jago buys two stunning brooches made centuries apart, while David Harper finds a Great War campaign chest and a stunning copper charger.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's all about the Lakes, and Hettie Jago hunts for animal-themed antiques, including equine vesta cases and Japanese netsukes in the form of crabs. David Harper tracks down a bear and an Art Deco figurine.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the last day of their trip, Hettie Jago has one last chance to catch up with David Harper. Hettie invests in varied items, from inkwells to hat stands and one big-ticket item. David waits for an urns stand, only to find two at once.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Ishy Khan start their trip in Northumberland. Natasha is drawn to a whimsical 19th century French candelabrum, while Ishy makes friends with a family of teddies and the cutest Jack Russell ever.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, Natasha Raskin Sharp finds a satirical Georgian caricature and a George III silver cream jug. Ishy Khan buys a dainty Victorian love heart watch key, some Persian salt bags and a glass terrarium.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In East Yorkshire, Natasha Raskin Sharp puts on the ritz with a 1920s flapper dress and snaps up a Scottish Arts and Crafts potpourri bowl and more. Ishy Khan picks up a glass inkwell shaped like a terrier, and antique prayer mat and more.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, Natasha Raskin Sharp collects some Georg Jensen christening cutlery, and Robert "Mouseman" Thompson cheeseboard, and some antique jugs. Meanwhile, Ishy Khan invests in a beautiful Art Nouveau charger.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the East Midlands, Natasha Raskin Sharp picks up a 17th century map of Nottinghamshire and a Victorian reception bell, while Ishy Khan eyes an optician's antique stock and a Victorian prayer chair. Who will be triumphant?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell set off from Bristol in a little red Morgan Roadster. On their first day, they amass a variety of treasures, including a vintage florist's stand, tiles, a vintage French wine map and more.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an eclectic mix of bargain buys today. Catherine Southon eyes a jardinière, motoring vanity set, streetlamp and an art Deco cocktail glass numbering set. Phil Serrell pursues an antique adjustable bookcase and a flag.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell explore sunny Surrey. Catherine is drawn to two jewelry pieces and scoops up a hand-turned Czech vase. Phil falls for a bronze dog and snaps up some garden ornaments.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Cardiff Castle. Treasures range from a simple pottery jug given as a love token to an early Hockney print found in a junk shop.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Minehead Railway Station, where items include a 19th-century washing machine and an exquisite miniature of Napoleon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Cardiff Castle, Fiona Bruce is on the hunt for a rare 1933 pennyworth a small fortune while one expert finds a piece he has been waiting 40 years to see.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are in Belfast, outside the Parliament Buildings. Treasures include diving gear associated with the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Trelissick House in Cornwall. Items of interest include an escape pod from a Vulcan bomber and a miniature sewing kit.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk. Treasures include a dazzling sapphire ring and a Girl Guide sketch by Robert Baden-Powell.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team is in Leicester at the historic Abbey Pumping Station.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are in Belfast at the Parliament Buildings on the Stormont Estate. Treasures turning up include a unique George Best collection and Titanic memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Leicester's Abbey Pumping Station, where treasures include a 1960s sculpture and a set of exotic boxes with an intriguing use.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Newcastle's Civic Centre - a towering modernist building packed with technical innovations well ahead of their time.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: As part of its 40th anniversary series, Antiques Roadshow returns for a second helping of finds from the Isle of Wight. The picturesque location is Osborne House.

programme.title: Polar Bear: Spy on the Ice
programme.desc: First of a two part film offering a rare insight into the life of polar bears.

programme.title: Polar Bear: Spy on the Ice
programme.desc: Second of a two part film offering a rare insight into the life of polar bears.

programme.title: The Great Ice Bear Event
programme.desc: Footage of polar bears encountering humans.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A mother moose and her calf struggle to survive in the Canadian wilderness while facing wolves, swarms of biting flies and Arctic weather.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A look at the differing fortunes of a mother polar bear, a mother grizzly bear and their cubs, in a rapidly changing world; the shrinking Arctic ice is making life tougher for polar bears, but it is offering new opportunities for grizzly bears.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: When the North Wind Blows
programme.desc: The challenges of living in some of the coldest places on Earth.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.desc: This program explores the resilience of nature on the shortest day of the year, showcasing wildlife and the insulated human world.

programme.title: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: With Britain in the grip of winter and facing the coldest temperatures of the year, wildlife must cope with the cold.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Elle and Inga, 17-year-old cousins from Norway, herd reindeer; they and their families accompany reindeer herds on an annual migration.

programme.title: Reindeer Family and Me
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to the wilderness of Lapland where he visits with the indigenous Sami people, reindeer, and sees the Northern Lights.

programme.title: Running With Reindeer
programme.desc: Saba Douglas-Hamilton travels to the Arctic Circle to live with Sami reindeer herders, and participate in the winter reindeer round-up.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Every fall the world's largest land carnivores gather to await the freeze-up of Hudson Bay in Churchill, Manitoba, Canada, the polar bear capital of the world.

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Behind nature's winter wonderland are some of the toughest places to survive. Hidden cameras in a new generation of Spy Creatures reveal the fascinating behaviors of animals from penguins to parrots, polar bears to otters, wallabies, and wombats.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Nigella's Amsterdam Christmas
programme.desc: Nigella travels to Amsterdam to enjoy the festive season in the Venice of the North; she visits her favorite places in the Dutch capital city, picks up special ingredients for her festive feasting and makes traditional Dutch speculaas.

programme.title: Mary Berry at Home
programme.desc: Paprika chicken; Canterbury tart.

programme.title: Mary Berry at Home
programme.desc: Fish plate; minted chicken; chocolate torte.

programme.title: Mary Berry at Home
programme.desc: Warm salad; stir fry.

programme.title: Mary Berry at Home
programme.desc: Hazelnut meringue torte.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Basic principles of making Christmas cakes, Suffolk ham and pickled pears.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Guest Alice King helps with the wine menu appropriate to the season's desserts.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Mincemeat; apple-nut strudel; roast pheasant with cranberry relish.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Canapes; roast goose with prunes; braised-beef casserole; champagne jellies; chocolate truffle torte.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Cheese-and-parsnip roulade; chocolate truffles; cake decorating.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Recipes include roast turkey with cranberry sauce, bread sauce and three stuffings; orange trifle; rum sauce for Christmas pudding.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Warm poached-egg salad with frizzled chorizo.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Mellow pumpkin soup; Libyan soup with couscous.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Saffron is a key ingredient in Delia Smith's Moroccan chicken.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Linguine with mussels and parsley pesto.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Delia prepares some classic sunday lunch dishes and puddings, which are great in winter.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Delia looks at the sort of party food which goes down well in Winter.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Braised dishes and casseroles, including braised lamb with flageolet beans and meatballs in goulash sauce.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Delia's winter recipes feature broccoli soufflé and several great vegetarian options.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Pancake batter; pancake cannelloni with meat; dark marmalade.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Winter Collection
programme.desc: Delia prepares a range of dishes from the far east.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Monica and Giles work in a glass-fronted hotel in the historic Croatian town of Rovinj.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Giles and Monica work alongside staff in some of the most extraordinary hotels across the globe.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Giles Coren and Monica Galetti visit Qasr Al Sarab Desert Resort; surrounded by vast sand dunes and scorching heat, guests relax in palatial comfort with swimming pools, huge baths and lush gardens.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Giles Coren visit London's most expensive and exclusive hotel, the Lanesborough; the hotel is set discreetly in a grand and historic building on London's Hyde Park Corner.

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Two festive specials full of gorgeous treats and inspiration for a thoroughly crafty Christmas.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: New Orleans

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: New Orleans

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to San Antonio to help a "cool mom" owner stop partying and start running her business like a professional.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Sisters Betsy and Stephanie spend most of their time at work tossing back shots, and it's up to Jon to keep these two from running their biker bar into a ditch.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A hostile chef and a lascivious owner complicate Jon's efforts to save Dimples, America's oldest karaoke bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Midvale, Utah, to meet The Union owner Bill, who is over $500,000 in debt and hasn't picked up any of the bar knowledge required to help his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: It's deja vu when Jon returns to Second Base Bar to find it's once again on the brink of failure, leaving him to decide whether or not he wants to attempt a re-rescue.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An industrious immigrant with a history of business success bites off more than he can chew when he buys Blue Water and takes a hands-off management approach.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of brothers can't see eye-to-eye on how to run their business, so one of them takes a run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Louisiana to rescue Big Mike's Sports Bar & Grill, a once-thriving bar and community staple that was cut down by devastating floods.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon challenges the owner of a beer-only bar being undercut by a BYOB liquor policy to harness her redneck ingenuity in order to save her business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives in the nick of time to save Sidelines, a family-operated sports bar being run into the ground by a violent father.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a near-fatal heart attack, Artie, the owner of Alibi in Las Vegas, lost his zeal for the work, and it's up to Jon to help him get it back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Captain Alexis "Alex" Ryker, the conniving CEO of a private lifeguard company, wants to take over Baywatch to expand her private lifeguarding empire. Mitch suspects Alex of setting up fake rescues and recruits Cody to spy on the BayGuard team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody accompanies Alex on a vacation to Hawaii where she wants to take her autistic 10-year-old nephew, Timmy, to swim with a dolphin in the local lagoon. Cody spends quality time with Lani's sister, Callie, a local Hawaiian lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious lifeguard makes rescues around Baywatch, then vanishes. After going over Mitch's head one too many times, Alex gets an annoying new partner.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April suffers PTSD after losing a rescue victim. Mitch and the victim's widow refused to give up searching for his body. Jessie runs into an old beau who could undermine her future at Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie struggles with his irresponsible actions leading to a boating accident that leaves a girl in a coma. Jessie is gripped with fear after April tells her of a recent, job-related tragedy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch befriends a boy who joins junior lifeguards in hopes of escaping a brutal home life. Jessie makes a passionate play for JD. Alex auditions for “Jeopardy!”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Upset about his failed marriage to Neely, Mitch goes for a day-long tower swim along the beach and encounters problems that distract from his own, including April and Craig's May/December romance, and reluctant heroes Cody and JD.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A young, hearing-impaired girl learns a lesson in friendship when she, Mitch and Alex protect an orangutan, while Cody and Jessie deal with its abusive owner.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody puts his career, and his life, on the line when he uses a performance-enhancing supplement in hopes of making the Olympic swim team. Alex becomes the object of Mitch's rejection, and Newmie's affection.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch tries to reunite an Army parachutist with her estranged Naval-officer father, while Cody helps a beautiful woman try to reach record-setting depths at a national free-diving competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he tries to save Tanner from his abusive father, Mitch ends up on the wrong side of the law. Meanwhile, Jessie's irresistible charm makes a stunt pilot's heart take flight.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When caught up in a high-risk adventure at sea, Craig tells Mitch a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Jessie works to creatively end JD and Cody's rivalry during a beachside triathlon, and April comes clean with Manny.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch feels the need for speed when Tanner's cousin, Damon Lusk, a race car driver in town for a major competition, visits Baywatch. Meanwhile, Newmie and the gang develop a TV show about lifeguards that they try to sell it into syndication.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch's lifeguard buddy's ex-wife dies in Australia, Mitch and the team accompany him on a trip down under to meet the son he's never known.

programme.title: Best of Johnny Eblen
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Johnny Eblen!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Undefeated Welterweight Ukrainian champ Yaroslav Amosov puts his belt on the line against Jamaican Jason Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Hollywood, Florida with an explosive night of fights. Champion Eddie Alvarez defends his belt against Lightweight Tournament Winner Michael Chandler in one of Bellator MMA's most epic fights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Irvine with two belts on the line! First Pat Curren defends his Featherweight belt against Patricio 'Pitbull' Freire. Then in the main event, Michael Chandler takes on Rick Hawn for the Lightweight World Championship.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, Oklahoma as Ben Askren defends his Welterweight belt against Season 7 tournament winner Karl Amoussou. Plus the Bellator MMA debut of King Mo fighting in his home state.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Atlantic City, NJ with the Featherweight Championship belt on the line! Champion Pat Curran defends his title against Season 8 Featherweight tournament winner Shahbulat Shamhalaev.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Rio Rancho, NM. Welterweight Champion Ben Askren takes on Welterweight season 8 tournament winner Andrey Koreskov. Then Michael Chandler defends his Lightweight belt against the Lightweight season 8 tournament winner David Rickels.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany & Sheka aren't alone in accusations ex-boyfriend Erik lies & scams constantly. Dr. Phil talks to ex-girlfriends Torri & Courtney & ex-wife, Martha, all sharing in Erik's deceitful behavior. Erik's revealed as an alleged con man--will he change?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Kelly says Ellie, 16, is on a path of self-destruction, & she fears for her daughter's life. Ellie has an eating disorder, is suicidal, cuts herself & has overdosed on drugs while lashing out in anger on a daily basis. Dr. Phil helps set a new path.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Last year, Judy says her husband of 30 years, Danny, suffered a mid-life crisis, had an affair and filed for divorce -- but now he wants her back. What advice does Dr. Phil give the couple?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They smoke, drink, speed, pop pills, disappear all night and disrespect their parents all day. They are teens gone wild and Dr. Phil has a wake-up call for them and their parents. Parents, if you're in power struggles with your teen, don't miss this show!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 1. Dr. Phil tells the real story & meets the real people who knew the real monster that was Dahmer. Hear from the sister of a victim saying the Netflix series glorified the man she calls "Satan," also two men tortured by Dahmer.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget is worried her brother-in-law Kevin, 38, is having an inappropriate relationship with her daughter, Grace,16. Red flags went up when Grace told her that Kevin put whipped cream on his neck & asked her to lick it off. Kevin denies it all. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town--but so are obnoxious relatives, gifts you have no use for, and drunken co-workers. Dr. Phil, along with etiquette expert Peggy Post, have answers for handling uncomfortable situations at end-of-year festivities.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany wrote to Dr. Phil devastated to discover that her boyfriend, the man she loves & with whom she is having a baby, leads a double life. But Dr. Phil discovered that Brittany was leaving out important details. What his team uncovered is shocking!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets Candice, who says she is convinced her mom, Lois, is being scammed by men online. Sister LouAnn says Lois sacrificed her 37-year marriage & retirement savings. Lois's only barrier to the love of her life? He is stuck in Africa. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says daughter, Danielle, 21, is out of control. She's been arrested twice, once for "clocking" a man she was dating in the face, & the second for public intoxication. She has violent rages, refuses to take her meds, does drugs, & drives drunk.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jean says her 17-year-old daughter, Cheyenne, was the all-American girl , a cheerleader, track star and straight-A honor student until she began dating Josh, a 28-year-old divorced father. Dr. Phil takes a look at Josh's history, should Jean be concerned?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Imprudente
programme.desc: Frank debe descubrir la verdad cuando un agente encubierto acusa a un compañero de brutalidad policial. Además, Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un famoso fotógrafo acusado recientemente de agresión por sus antiguas modelos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Niebla de guerra
programme.desc: Danny y Baez trabajan con el Ranger de Texas Waylon Gates (Lyle Lovett) cuando les encargan un caso para encontrar al Asesino de la Estrella Solitaria.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Intereses personales
programme.desc: Jamie está siendo investigado después de que su chaleco de policía sea encontrado en un delincuente, y Frank se debate entre ayudar y proteger a un viejo amigo, Chuck Kennedy (Ed Asner), cuya casa ha sido invadida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los primeros 100 días
programme.desc: Frank y Garrett idean un plan para convencer al alcalde Chase de que colabore mejor con los demás para dirigir correctamente la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando uno de los antiguos casos de Tony se reabre, él intercambia roles con Gibbs para finalmente resolver el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un agente compañero es asesinado, el equipo de NCIS se dirige al desierto para localizar a una mujer que podría tener la respuesta al misterio del asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La muerte de un boxeador lleva a Vance a pedir prestado al equipo de NCIS para comenzar a investigar el caso, mientras Gibbs indaga en el pasado de Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle leads an officer on a hot pursuit, a deputy encounters a nervous driver with a big secret, and a young cyclist tries to make a quick getaway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pursuit ends with the suspect on a roof, a driver calls deputies when a pedestrian loses his cool, and a relationship is jeopardized when a man results to illegal habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Watching football turns a couple against each other, a cop gets fed up with a repeat shoplifter, and a man tries to swallow a bag of marijuana before officers find it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers the shredded remains of a man, they find themselves with multiple suspects who may be responsible for his death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two men are murdered right before exposing a natural gas company for poisoning residents in a farming town, and the CSIs must discover who is responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man's fatal fall from a hotel balcony launches the CSIs into an investigation to determine if his death was suicide or the result of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs set out to track down a pedophile suspected of murdering an FBI agent's wife and kidnapping his children.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a seemingly fake photo of a dead call girl appears online, the CSIs follow up on a lead to find the woman was actually murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to possible execution by the electric chair - and to a legendary Vegas murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb, prompting Sara to interrogate the students and faculty of the college where her mother-in-law works.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box; meanwhile, Langston's wife pays a surprise visit to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer, Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Following his escape, Nate Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la cárcel del condado de Clark después de que un interno tropieza con un cuerpo mientras huye de los oficiales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la extraña muerte de un hombre que ha sido asesinado no una, sino dos veces. Sharon Osbourne es la estrella invitada en el papel de Elise Massey, la directora del campeonato de billar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La investigación del CSI sobre la víctima de un aparente accidente y fuga, los lleva al mundo aeronáutico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI reabre un caso de asesinato/suicidio de 10 años de antigüedad, cuando la única sobreviviente afirma que su padre acusado era inocente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI descubre que el principal sospechoso de los asesinatos en Gig Harbor, está siendo puesto en libertad por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una convención para gente que recoge recuerdos de asesinatos macabros.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una joven víctima disfrazada de súper héroe.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando una muerte en la que están implicados un Rolls-Royce antiguo y una víctima cubierta de cromo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando el asesinato de dos chicas adolescentes que fueron secuestradas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La unidad de CSI se enfrenta al último duelo con el asesino de Gig Harbor cuyos motivos son eventualmente revelados.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En el estreno de la novena temporada, el equipo de CSI se une después de que Warrick recibe un disparo en un callejón de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una hipnotizadora que usa sus poderes de persuasión para robar bancos se convierte en la principal sospechosa en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una serie de víctimas fallecidas en medio de sus actividades cotidianas, el equipo de CSI debe determinar qué es lo que hace que permanezcan de pie después de la muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante el curso de una investigación, los CSI descubren que su víctima, una joven que fue asesinada y encontrada con varios tipos de sangre diferentes en su organismo, es hija de un criminal buscado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An adult film actress is found strangled to death in the park and the CSIs are called in to investigate and find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation leads the CSI team down a treacherous road that will lead to the tragic loss of one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Yelina's life is in danger when the Horatio and the CSI team works a case to convict a rapper suspected of a Miami-style drive-by.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de secuestro se vuelve personal para Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la víctima inesperadamente resulta ser la hermana de Boa Vista.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es decapitado mientras realiza un atrevido truco con su auto, el equipo sospecha que fue más que un simple accidente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio descubre un complot mortal contra la ciudad de Miami después de que una joven es asesinada en un evento benéfico. Él y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un reclutador de marines es asesinado, el equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo del reclutamiento de soldados y las familias que dejan atrás.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Están juzgando a Sonya Barak por ayudar en un complot para destruir Miami cuando su propia gente intenta matarla a tiros. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan al exmarido de Natalia, la evidencia sugiere que ella lo mató. Muchas personas tenían motivos para matar a Nick. Horatio y los CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida del detective Frank Tripp pende de un hilo cuando pisa una mina terrestre mientras investiga la escena de un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran un camión lleno de armas confiscadas y devuelven las armas al público, Horatio relaciona el crimen con Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Declaran muerto a un miembro del equipo tras recibir un disparo en la cabeza. No queriendo darse por vencido, Horatio hace que el equipo de CSI corra al hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar cuando los padres de una niñera en un vecindario exclusivo son brutalmente asesinados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de caza se vuelve mortal cuando un oso ataca a alguien del grupo y la evidencia sugiere un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un rico promotor inmobiliario, Horatio y el equipo de CSI sospecha de la esposa y las dos hermanas gemelas secretas de ella.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio sospecha que el supervisor del condado y los dueños de un casino de nativos norteamericanos cercano pueden estar involucrados cuando se encuentra a una víctima de asesinato sin el cuero cabelludo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan la muerte de una estrella de cine mientras se encontraba en un centro de rehabilitación de celebridades y estaba a punto de exponer algunos secretos dañinos.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The shooting of a 14-year-old boy in front of his 12-year-old brother takes Detective Mac Taylor’s drive for justice to another level.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a couple is found beaten in their home, the CSIs think they have the suspect after a mother ID's her son, but all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a powerful gang leader is murdered, the CSI New York team of investigators must find the killer before a street war breaks out.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A jewel heist at the penthouse of one of New York's most powerful attorneys takes a bizarre turn as the case leads the CSIs to a man in the morgue.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators finds a body on a rooftop and must find the killer who is manipulating crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With a sniper lose in New York City, Mac must relive an abduction case that might have created one of the city's deadliest foes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators experience eerie occurrences after a woman is found who has literally been scared to death.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fruta prohibida (S5 Ep11)
programme.desc: Parece que el equipo de CSI tiene un caso sencillo después de que un sospechoso de asesinato queda empalado durante una persecución policial, pero resulta que recién está comenzando.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ayuda (S5 Ep12)
programme.desc: Las futuras novias se pelean por un vestido espléndido en la venta de vestidos de novia más grande del año y una de las compradoras termina muerta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juicio apresurado (S5 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe armar un rompecabezas humano cuando las partes del cuerpo amputadas de un querido entrenador de lucha se encuentran enterradas en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ella no está ahí (S5 Ep14)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un turista ruso muerto a puñaladas y el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con la aterradora realidad de la trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fiesta terminó (S5 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver del alcalde cae del techo en una recaudación de fondos de caridad, Stella y su cita se encuentran en medio de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ninguna buena acción (S5 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando a un buitre que vuela sobre Manhattan se le cae un globo ocular humano de la garra, comienza la carrera para encontrar el cuerpo al que pertenece.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Parque verde (S5 Ep17)
programme.desc: Una bomba casera destruye una casa de Manhattan y valiosas evidencias, lo que obliga al equipo de CSI a ser creativo en la reconstrucción de las pruebas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto sin retorno (S5 Ep18)
programme.desc: Encuentran asesinado a un ex médico forense y un polvo blanco hallado en el lugar le brinda al equipo de CSI una importante pista para rastrear al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Error de comunicación (S5 Ep19)
programme.desc: Cuando un jefe indígena de EE. UU. recibe un disparo, el equipo de CSI lucha por traducir cuál de los varios sospechosos extranjeros pudo haber causado su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Presa (S5 Ep20)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la muerte a tiros de un hombre en un teatro vacío, Stella se da cuenta de que la escena del crimen es extrañamente familiar y planeada.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pasado, presente y homicidio (S5 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere al caer del piso 52 y su cuerpo desaparece después de tocar el suelo, el equipo de CSI debe tratar este caso como la desaparición de una persona.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Aniversario luctuoso (S5 Ep22)
programme.desc: La subasta de joyas más exclusiva del año termina abruptamente cuando asesinan a un tasador durante el evento. Hay un cambio emocional en la investigación.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Un bien mayor (S5 Ep23)
programme.desc: Mac le informa a un ex convicto que cumplió condena por un crimen que no cometió y Anna le dice a Danny que es hora de que nazca el primer bebé del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La verdad me engaña (S5 Ep24)
programme.desc: Stella descubre que los neoyorquinos están siendo asesinados por artefactos griegos antiguos, ella entrega su placa para seguir una pista que la lleva a Grecia.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Adam hace una campaña en las redes para desprestigiar a Adela por dejar plantado a su amigo. Ernesto es un pervertido que convenció a su hijastra de encerrarla en un sótano como esclava sexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: De pequeña a Amanda la castigaban metiéndole la mano en el váter para que no se chupara el dedo. También, David siente una particular atracción por un árbol y se casó con él.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Miguel le dio dinero a Carmelo para que lo guarde, pero su amigo ya no lo tiene. Por otro lado, su hermano menor se prostituye por dinero, pero ella es la mayor y quiere rescatar a su hermana.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Karla cree que su madre la abandonó a merced de su padre, que abusó de ella, pero descubrirá un oscuro secreto. Además, Paola se está separando de su esposo Alberto, pero este la drogó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Micaela, en defensa de su mamá, le lanza una cafetera a su papá y lo mata. Por otro lado, el amante de María, en un encuentro de placer, le hace un hematoma en el cuello que se complica.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luis se ha casado con su nana, una anciana con problemas de memoria, ahora es el heredero. También, Samantha sufre discriminación en el trabajo por su imagen desfigurada tras un accidente.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El esposo de Wendy desapareció, el hombre perdió la memoria y se volvió a casar. Además, María fue llevada a La Fábrica, una finca donde prostituyen y trafican mujeres.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edilia y su hijo evacuaron durante el huracán Irma y casi mueren por culpa de un generador. Además, Edgar busca su tableta con una app de rastreo, lo que encuentra es a su esposa con el jefe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Hace años Pedro salvó la vida de las gemelas Gabriela y Daniela, ahora las chicas se volvieron ingratas. También, Claribel tiene orden de deportación y no quiere llevarse a su hija.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Diana es tan celosa y controladora que le implantó a Derick un micro GPS en el pene. En otro caso, a la hija de Teresa la intentaron violar en el parqueo de un centro comercial.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Miguel tiene una empresa de fumigación al borde de la quiebra por su inclinación a tener sexo con sus clientas. También, Marla está trabajando en casa de Marco para conseguir su ADN.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La renovación del estatus migratorio de Tony fue negada y será deportado. Por otro lado, Mia y Frankel son soldados y pasan por un estrés emocional que afecta la relación de pareja.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Guillermo estaba haciendo un 'reality show' y Lorena descubre que todo lo que sucede es montado. Por otro lado, César fue abusado sexualmente por su abuelo cuando era pequeño.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Indira tenía un noviazgo con el hijo de Gema, cuenta que el chico era agresivo, pero hay dudas de su versión. Dora tiene un gimnasio de yoga, en sus clases combina la práctica con la cerveza.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam gloats when he has reason to believe that Diane is still in love with him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at "her" hangout.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The discovery of an engagement ring hidden in their father's drawer leads Niles and Frasier to investigate Sherry's checkered past before Martin has a chance to "pop the question.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Fed up with his cutthroat agent Bebe, Frasier soon learns the high price of hiring a "nice" agent to represent him in contract negotiations.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is shocked to discover that his trusted marriage counselor and Maris are having a torrid affair behind his back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A weekend ski trip snowballs into a hotbed of romantic antics for Frasier, Niles and their friends.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Lilith stirs old passions in Frasier and new ones in Niles.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a family wedding re-ignites a long-simmering feud between Frasier and his fiery Greek Aunt Zora.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio station hires a handsome new doctor to host a call-in medical show, but Frasier, nursing his male ego, is determined to find a flaw in his new colleague, who seems just a little "too perfect.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Bulldog wrongfully takes credit for foiling a robbery and saving Roz's life, Frasier becomes determined to make Bulldog "come clean.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's torn between his "lust" for his latest conquest and the realization that they have nothing in common except great sex.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles gets Daphne to help him plan a phony dinner date with a neighbor so she won't realize how much he really cares for her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz worries about the fate of her new baby when she discovers that the parents of her baby's father have two of the biggest noses she's ever seen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's newly divorced friend tries to come between him and Diane.

programme.title: Cheers
